intended_use: Viewing, post-processing, qualitative and quantitative evaluation of blood vessels and cardiovascular CT images in DICOM format.
intended_use_full: Viewing, post-processing, qualitative and quantitative evaluation of blood vessels and cardiovascular CT images in DICOM format.
target_condition: Coronary artery disease (CAD) or suspected CAD; presence and extent of coronary plaques and stenoses
ground_truth: Reference standard established from three expert annotators
other_metrics: Lumen Mean Dice Similarity Coefficient: 0.76; Wall Mean DSC: 0.80; Lumen Mean Hausdorff Distance: 0.77 mm; Wall Mean Hausdorff Distance: 0.87 mm; Total Plaque Pearson Correlation Coefficient: 0.97; Calcified Plaque PCC: 0.99; Non-Calcified Plaque PCC: 0.93; Low-Attenuation Plaque PCC: 0.74
